'''鈭歵-t-zh''' ('''katatazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pedestrianise|pedestrianise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pedestrianise|pedestrianise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-t-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katatazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitatazh|thitatazh]] || [[word:jitatazh|jitatazh]] || [[word:shitatazh|shitatazh]] || [[word:kitatazh|kitatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutatazh|thuthutatazh]] || [[word:jujutatazh|jujutatazh]] || [[word:shushutatazh|shushutatazh]] || [[word:kukutatazh|kukutatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutatazh|thutatazh]] || [[word:jutatazh|jutatazh]] || [[word:shutatazh|shutatazh]] || [[word:kutatazh|kutatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutatazh|thutatazh]] || [[word:jutatazh|jutatazh]] || [[word:shutatazh|shutatazh]] || [[word:kutatazh|kutatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetatazh|thetatazh]] || [[word:jetatazh|jetatazh]] || [[word:shetatazh|shetatazh]] || [[word:ketatazh|ketatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotatazh|thothotatazh]] || [[word:jojotatazh|jojotatazh]] || [[word:shoshotatazh|shoshotatazh]] || [[word:kokotatazh|kokotatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotatazh|thotatazh]] || [[word:jotatazh|jotatazh]] || [[word:shotatazh|shotatazh]] || [[word:kotatazh|kotatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotatazh|thotatazh]] || [[word:jotatazh|jotatazh]] || [[word:shotatazh|shotatazh]] || [[word:kotatazh|kotatazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]] || [[word:tatazh|tatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tatazh|th忙tatazh]] || [[word:j忙tatazh|j忙tatazh]] || [[word:sh忙tatazh|sh忙tatazh]] || [[word:k忙tatazh|k忙tatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatatazh|thathatatazh]] || [[word:jajatatazh|jajatatazh]] || [[word:shashatatazh|shashatatazh]] || [[word:kakatatazh|kakatatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatatazh|thatatazh]] || [[word:jatatazh|jatatazh]] || [[word:shatatazh|shatatazh]] || [[word:katatazh|katatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatatazh|thatatazh]] || [[word:jatatazh|jatatazh]] || [[word:shatatazh|shatatazh]] || [[word:katatazh|katatazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatatazh|shatatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatatazh|goshatatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatatazh|gokishatatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatatazhn眉|shatatazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkn眉|goshatatazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatazhn眉|gokishatatazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatatazhsh毛|shatatazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatatazhnksh毛|goshatatazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatatazhsh毛|gokishatatazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatazhro|shatatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkro|goshatatazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatazhro|gokishatatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatazhmu|shatatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkmu|goshatatazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatazhmu|gokishatatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatatazhsher|shatatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatatazhnksher|goshatatazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatatazhsher|gokishatatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatatazhng|shatatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkng|goshatatazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatatazhng|gokishatatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatatazhya|shatatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkya|goshatatazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatatazhya|gokishatatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatatazhyam|shatatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkyam|goshatatazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatatazhyam|gokishatatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatazhn眉sh毛|shatatazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkn眉sh毛|goshatatazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatazhn眉sh毛|gokishatatazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatazhn眉ro|shatatazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkn眉ro|goshatatazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatazhn眉ro|gokishatatazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatazhn眉mu|shatatazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkn眉mu|goshatatazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatazhn眉mu|gokishatatazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatazhsh毛n眉|shatatazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatazhnksh毛n眉|goshatatazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatazhsh毛n眉|gokishatatazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatazhsh毛ro|shatatazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatazhnksh毛ro|goshatatazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatazhsh毛ro|gokishatatazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatazhsh毛mu|shatatazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatazhnksh毛mu|goshatatazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatazhsh毛mu|gokishatatazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatazhron眉|shatatazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkron眉|goshatatazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatazhron眉|gokishatatazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatazhrosh毛|shatatazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkrosh毛|goshatatazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatazhrosh毛|gokishatatazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatazhromu|shatatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkromu|goshatatazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatazhromu|gokishatatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatazhmun眉|shatatazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkmun眉|goshatatazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatazhmun眉|gokishatatazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatazhmush毛|shatatazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkmush毛|goshatatazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatazhmush毛|gokishatatazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatazhmuro|shatatazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatazhnkmuro|goshatatazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatazhmuro|gokishatatazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
